text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Symboli Rudolf has a number of
victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I drop by the student council office to discuss the
raffle prize we had previously won together.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Save it until I have earned the holiday.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As for when that is, I leave it to your discretion. I
know that you will judge me fair and true.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I see... So you believe the time has come.
choice_data_list:
You've achieved so much during our time
together.

You've achieved so much during our time
together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I know she's still a long way from where she hopes
to be, but she has more than earned a break.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Very well. I trust your judgment.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Would you mind if I invited the other student
council members?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If I have been working hard, they have been
working even harder. They too deserve a chance
to relax.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Don't be ridiculous. How could you possibly
unwind with us around?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
We can handle things here just fine while you're
away.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Air Groove... Brian...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Fortunately, we're through the busy season.
Leave us to take care of the rest and let your hair
down a little.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, how could I refuse an offer like that? Thank
you, both of you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well then, Trainer... It seems we have a relaxing
vacation ahead of us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With that, we start getting ready for our trip.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (not displayed in-game)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Sigh... That was delightful.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry if I kept you waiting, but I relished every
moment of the bath.
choice_data_list: As long as you enjoyed yourself.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate that. I must say, these hot springs are
marvelous.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Steam does wonders to clear my mind. As my
thoughts dissolve in the heat, unexpected truths
come into focus.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: It has been a deeply fulfilling experience... Although, I may have stayed in the water a little too long.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It is nothing to worry about. Although I would like
to rest a little before we eat.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
What do you say we head outside to get some
fresh air?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You're looking a little flushed yourself.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
What a delightful breeze. Perfect for cooling off
after a long soak.
choice_data_list: What were you thinking about in there?
What were you thinking about in there?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
All manner of things. The mundane and the
metaphysical, the meaningful and the trivial...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And I recall coming up with the most marvelous
puns... or so I thought at the time, at least.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thoughts come hazily in the hot springs, I've
found.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: But there is one thing that I remember clearly.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The path we have walked shines brightly in the
dark, even when the moon is hidden.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We have certainly faced our fair share of
adversity, but I would not trade it for the world.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I wish for nothing more than to forge onward by
your side and follow this luminescent path far into
the distance.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I hope you are prepared to do the same. After all,
I have no intention of letting you go.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: And the same to you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha... With all that said, I feel a little flustered.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Could we stay out here a little longer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We discuss all sorts of things after that, both
meaningful and trivial.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Symboli Rudolf and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
